generated_oml:
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived geometric models enhanced with semantic representations of Building Control System components defined by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor component defined by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeBCSData
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator component defined by Building Control Engineers"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller component defined by Building Control Engineers"
]

instance RealTimeBCSData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSRealTimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control System sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeBCSData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataExchangeEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Applies Model-Driven Engineering principles to transform enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDeploymentService
]

instance DataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages real-time data exchange protocols for synchronization between physical infrastructure and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService
]

instance ModelDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying DT artifacts generated via Model-Driven Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeploymentInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and control service for infrastructure management in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure optimization in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance EnhancedDecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for lifecycle management in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]

instance ModelDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployed DT artifacts for operational synchronization"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for real-time system monitoring"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure optimization"
]

instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven decision-making support for building operations"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time control actions for Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building in AECO domain serving as a cyber-physical asset for lifecycle management"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM (defining sensors, actuators, controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation of enriched models into structured representations, automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts, real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization, and modular extension through custom services for operational evolution. Governance is managed via stakeholder-specific functional requirements (F_X) and use cases across deployment and operation phases."
]
